title: スワンSの後に・強くおっきく！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes out of the race happy and satisfied
because she was able to run at a much more
relaxed pace than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Ch., fall's biggest event where the best
racers gather to test their mettle, is up next!
